summaries.title: Telegram Bot Frictionless Coding & Context Awareness Improvements
summaries.summary: The lesson focused on making Telegram bot coding workflows frictionless by ensuring the UI matches backend behavior—hiding manual approval buttons during auto-mode and showing progress messages instead. Key improvements included persistent reply keyboards to reduce typing, passing conversation context to the classifier for accurate follow-up intent resolution, and adding bounded typing indicators to prevent leaks if workers crash.
